issue_log.details: joico.com returned HTTP 403 for professional color and sitemap URLs from research environment.
Primary .com domain returned empty/404; inventory used us.lorealprofessionnel.com navigation.
Dedicated hair-color landing URLs returned 404; line names extracted from embedded Next.js navigation payload on 404 template.
Consumer site confirms The Demi product; other pro lines (Color XG, The Color, PM Shines) not mapped to official line hubs.
pulp-riot.com connection reset; pulpriot.com redirected to Facebook.
dangerjones.com SSL/connection failures from research environment.
framesi.com resolved to unrelated content in one fetch; framesi.us returned minimal placeholder response.
Gatsby color-list pages did not expose shade/product JSON in static HTML; lines inferred from filter parameters and pro pages only.
Seed-brand pass complete; additional pro brands (e.g., Chi, Scruples, Milk Shake) not inventoried in this stage.
